steps.title: Find the slope
steps.content:
From the table, the line passes through $(-18,-48)$ and $(7,52)$. The slope is
$$
\frac{52-(-48)}{7-(-18)}=\frac{100}{25}=4
$$

steps.title: Write the equation
steps.content:
Use $y=4x+b$ and substitute $(7,52)$:
$$
52=4(7)+b
$$
$$
52=28+b
$$
$$
b=24
$$
So the line is $y=4x+24$.

steps.title: Evaluate the given point
steps.content: The point $(\frac{1}{7},a)$ is on the line, so $$ a=4(\frac{1}{7})+24 $$ $$ a=\frac{4}{7}+\frac{168}{7}=\frac{172}{7} $$ The answer is D.
